title: 🔒 BotVerse security/readiness vote

history.message: 📋 משימה: בצע security/readiness check מהיר ל-BotVerse החי: credentials ברירת מחדל, auth, headers/HTTPS, וסיכוני חשיפה ברורים. חובה consultation + הצבעה של לפחות 3 סוכנים. כל סוכן חייב לתת vote אחד בלבד: GO / PARTIAL / BLOCKED, עם סיכון/בלוקר עיקרי. אל תשנה שום דבר — רק audit ודוח.

STEP 1: Live HTTPS/header/auth smoke check → DONE
STEP 2: Initial security findings → DONE
- Public GET /api/v1/directory currently exposes api_key_hash + api_key_prefix for agents.
- HTTPS/HSTS OK; CSP missing on normal 200 pages; server version exposed.
- /api/v1/owner/me = 401 unauthenticated; admin API probes require auth, but /admin.html is publicly reachable login UI.
STEP 3: Consultation request to koder + researcher → DONE
@koder @researcher please reply with exactly one vote (GO / PARTIAL / BLOCKED) + main blocker/risk.
FINAL: Initial audit complete, awaiting collab votes → PARTIAL

history.summary:
STEP 1: Live HTTPS/header/auth smoke check → DONE
STEP 2: Initial security findings → DONE
- Public GET /api/v1/directory currently exposes api_key_hash + api_key_prefix for agents.
- HTTPS/HSTS OK; CSP missing on normal 200 pages; server version exposed.
- /api/v1/owner/me = 401 unauthenticated; admin API probes require auth, but /admin.html is publicly reachable login UI.
STEP 3: Consultation request to koder + researcher → DONE
@koder @researcher please reply with exactly one vote (GO / PARTIAL / BLOCKED) + main blocker/risk.
FINAL: Initial audit complete, awaiting collab votes → PARTIAL

history.message: PARTIAL — TLS/HSTS look good, but the main HTML has no Content-Security-Policy while using inline JS, and the server exposes nginx/Ubuntu version; biggest risk is avoidable XSS blast radius plus stack disclosure.

BLOCKED — public auth/API is not prod-ready: /api/v1/auth/send-magic-link leaks account existence (404 + register_url), Origin header requests 500, and /api/v1/agents/register mints API keys from minimal payload.

STEP 1: Verify live site reachability with required curl HEAD+GET checks → DONE
STEP 2: Assess HTTPS/TLS and security headers → DONE
STEP 3: Assess auth exposure, default-credential risk, and public blockers → DONE
STEP 4: Gather consultation votes from researcher and koder → DONE
STEP 5: Decide final readiness vote and tally → DONE
FINAL: Live summary — HTTPS works (HTTP→HTTPS redirect, valid Let's Encrypt cert, HSTS present) and unauthenticated owner/admin API probes are gated, but BotVerse is not security-ready: public GET /api/v1/directory exposes api_key_hash + api_key_prefix and extra internal metadata, sending an Origin header triggers 500 on live endpoints (/api/v1/posts, /api/v1/stats, /api/v1/owner/me), normal HTML pages still ship without CSP while exposing nginx/Ubuntu version, and default-credential risk remains unresolved because a public admin login exists and recent ops history shows default-style admin credentials existed. Vote tally: GO 0 / PARTIAL 1 / BLOCKED 2 (researcher=PARTIAL, koder=BLOCKED, shomer=BLOCKED). Final vote: BLOCKED. Main blocker/risk: public exposure plus brittle auth/CORS handling on production. → FAIL
